name: Squalane
description: A lightweight, stable hydrocarbon that mimics skin's natural sebum for deep hydration without greasiness.
scientificSummary: An analogue of squalene, a naturally occurring lipid in sebum. Provides excellent emolliency and non-comedogenic moisturization.
mechanismOfAction: Integrates into the lipid matrix of the stratum corneum, reducing transepidermal water loss and improving skin flexibility.

seo.title: Squalane - Lightweight Deep Moisturizer | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore the science behind Squalane, the skin-identical emollient that hydrates all skin types.
